title: Add history field to image inspect
body:
This fixes #860 
Only add ```history``` to image inspect since the rest field mentioned in this issue are buildah specific. There is no sense to add it here.
Signed-off-by: Qi Wang <qiwan@redhat.com>

comments.body: I think we picked up one extra field that we don't need, but the rest looks fine
